name_cn:
Genuine leather
Model 1763 Return
Mini Glossy Calfskin Puzzle FoldMini
The Puzzle Fold bag draws inspiration from the geometric lines of the brand's classic handbag series, reinterpreting them with geometrically rich architectural patches that can fold completely, making it a great travel companion. The brand uses creative ingenuity to create a soft and lightweight bag paired with a low-key and elegant LOEWE logo. This mini version is crafted from glossy calfskin.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Suede lining
LOEWE hot stamping
16.5-9-20
